caption: A man wearing a green t-shirt with the text "DANERDO STILL WORK US" and a matching green baseball cap with headphones over it is seated in a studio setting. He is speaking into a professional microphone on a stand, with a second microphone visible to his right. Behind him, the background includes a clothing store display with the text "UNIQUE FASHIONS" and "VEM VIRTUAL REALITY" on banners, along with clothing on racks and a black chair. A logo featuring a red circle and white text is visible in the bottom left corner of the scene. Throughout the sequence, the man remains in the same position, talking and gesturing slightly with his hands on the table in front of him. His facial expressions shift as he speaks, and he briefly closes his eyes toward the end of the clip.
